not_a_verdict: Commercial pilot readiness. SUBMITTED for independent verification.
product: NOOS Software Repair Runway — Managed Pilot

customer_provides: an authorized repository (github or bundled fixture)
a reproducible failure (failing test command / CI run / defect)

proven_scope: 3 real fixture repair jobs across 3 defect classes (off-by-one, unused-import lint, wrong-operator data defect); each failing->passing with a verified patch. Python(pytest)+Node(node:test) pilot stacks only.

cost_model.hosted_model_estimate: $0.001-0.02 per repair (~2-8k tokens) once a provider key is set

pricing_proposal_founder_editable: PROPOSAL ONLY (founder to set): e.g. managed-pilot at a per-verified-repair fee or a small monthly managed fee; first pilot is manually sold + onboarded; no payment automation required.
gross_margin_model: deterministic-local pilot: margin ≈ price − (CI compute ≈ cents); hosted: margin ≈ price − (model cost $0.001-0.02 + CI compute).
readiness: manually-sold managed pilot is READY (offline/deterministic). Hosted-model repairs and production canonical liveness are gated (see cloud receipts).
